creator: r.neese@gmail.com
text:
1.0.7 is not stable yet it is only a nightly snapshot.
cannot base a port update on it .

On Wed, 2 Feb 2011 11:50:10 UT
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of net/freeswitch-core,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/154461 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/154461
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
